ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the module belongs to */,
  "last_analyzed" TEXT /* Date when the module was last analyzed */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository where the module is stored */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of the repository where the module is located */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the last analyzed version */,
  "last_analyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last analyzed the module */,
  "last_analyzed_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the last analysis in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module for which this metric applies */,
  "statements" INTEGER /* Total number of statements in the module */,
  "missing" INTEGER /* Number of missing statements */,
  "excluded" INTEGER /* Number of excluded lines */,
  "branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches in the code */,
  "partial" INTEGER /* Number of partial branches */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of code coverage */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were analyzed */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the code */,
  "maintainability_index" INTEGER /* Maintainability index of the code */,
  "code_smells" INTEGER /* Number of code smells identified */,
  "duplicated_lines" INTEGER /* Number of duplicated lines */,
  "code_churn" INTEGER /* Number of lines added, modified, or deleted in the last commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_quality_metrics_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, team lead, QA) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project for which the report is generated */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., compliance, summary, detailed) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., security, performance) */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module related to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
